name: bbsky
documentation:
# bbsky

Client for Blackbaud Sky API

classes.name: bbsky.sessions.SyncSessionManager
documentation:
Manages multiple user sessions for the Blackbaud Sky API.

Sessions are stored in a dict, with the user ID as the key.
If the number of sessions exceeds the max_sessions, the oldest session is removed.
This is to prevent the dictionary from growing indefinitely.

classes.name: bbsky.client.SearchConstituentsParams
documentation:
Search for constituents in the Blackbaud Sky API.

See docs:
https://developer.sky.blackbaud.com/api#api=crm-conmg&operation=SearchConstituents

functions.name: bbsky.logging.get_log_level_from_env
documentation:
Get log level from BBSKY_LOG_LEVEL environment variable if it exists.
Valid values are: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL

functions.name: bbsky.logging.setup_logger
documentation:
Create and configure a logger that can be used throughout the library.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the logger (default: "bbsky")
    level (int): The logging level (default: None, will use BBSKY_LOG_LEVEL env var or INFO)

documentation: Display the default paths used by bbsky.

classes.name: bbsky.cache.Cache

methods.name: bbsky.cache.Cache.get
documentation: Retrieve a value from the cache.

methods.name: bbsky.cache.Cache.set
documentation: Store a value in the cache with an optional TTL in seconds.

methods.name: bbsky.cache.Cache.delete
documentation: Remove a value from the cache.

methods.name: bbsky.cache.Cache.clear
documentation: Clear all values from the cache.
A simple cache interface.

classes.name: bbsky.cache.InMemoryCache
documentation:
A simple in-memory cache with optional TTL support.

Not thread-safe.
Not suitable for large amounts of data.

classes.name: bbsky.cache.DiskCache
documentation:
A simple disk-based cache that stores values as JSON files

The cache directory is created if it does not exist.
Not thread-safe.
Not suitable for large amounts of data.
Not a terribly efficient implementation (lots of disk I/O).

classes.name: bbsky.cache.RedisCache
documentation:
A Redis-backed cache implementation.

It requires a running Redis server.

classes.name: bbsky.config.SkyConfig
documentation:
Blackbaud app authentication credentials

See this URL for helpful troubleshooting tips:
https://developer.blackbaud.com/skyapi/docs/authorization/common-auth-issues

client_id: str - Your Blackbaud client ID (should be same as app ID)
client_secret: str - Your Blackbaud client secret (should be same as app secret)
redirect_uri: URL - The URL you've pre-configured for the application
subscription_key: str - Your Blackbaud subscription key
